userMessage: Set CH1 to 3.3V scale DC 1Mohm for SCL, CH2 to 3.3V DC 1Mohm for SDA. Set up I2C decode on B1 clock CH1 threshold 1.65V data CH2 threshold 1.65V. Add setup time measurement between CH1 falling edge and CH2 falling edge. Add hold time measurement between CH2 falling edge and CH1 rising edge. Set trigger on B1 I2C address 0x48 direction write. Single acquisition. Query setup and hold time results. Save both channels as binary and screenshot.

response.text:
I can’t emit applyable TekAutomate flow JSON for this request because exact verification is still insufficient for several required MSO4/5/6 commands.

Missing or not sufficiently verified from MCP exact lookup for this turn:
- I2C bus decode threshold commands for B1 on CH1/CH2
- I2C bus trigger commands for:
  - trigger on bus address
  - trigger read/write = WRITE
  - trigger address value = 0x48
- Measurement configuration commands needed to fully define 2-source SETUP and HOLD measurements on MSO4/5/6
  - I have verified `MEASUrement:ADDMEAS`, `MEASUrement:MEAS<x>:TYPe`, `MEASUrement:MEAS<x>:EDGE<x>`, and result query
  - but not the exact verified second-source / full source-pair configuration needed to safely build those measurements

Verified pieces available this turn were enough for:
- CH1/CH2 scale, coupling, termination
- creating/selecting an I2C bus
- assigning I2C clock/data sources
- single acquisition via `ACQuire:STOPAfter SEQuence` and `ACQuire:STATE RUN`
- querying measurement mean results
- saving waveforms/screenshots with TekAutomate built-ins

But because the trigger and measurement setup are incomplete, I’m failing closed instead of guessing.
